body.title: [sprint] Consequence check: why-sorter + per-ticket checkpoint
body.description:
**What changed:** Added a `rationale` column + debris-flag to constraints/patterns (why-sorter), and a clear-to-base context mechanism -- native `/rewind` -> "Restore conversation" driven by tmux send-keys between tickets (fork backend deferred) -- which REPLACED the originally-planned summarize-and-rehydrate/checkpoint-file approach.
**Predicted unintended effects:** (1) The `devlab.constraints` migration (why-sorter) could break `constraint_normalizer.ingest()` idempotency or `get_constraints()` callers if the new column isn't defaulted NULL-safe. (2) Debris-flagging every rationale-less constraint at once (why-sorter) could flood the channel/logs on first run (most constraints have no `Rationale:` yet) -- noise, not signal. (3) clear-to-base: send-keys menu navigation could select the WRONG /rewind entry -- rewinding too far (losing the base) or not enough (keeping the ticket delta) -- especially as session history grows and menu positions shift. (4) clear-to-base: although "Restore conversation" keeps code, uncommitted Edit/Write changes NOT yet `git commit`-ed at rewind time could be reverted by checkpointing -- the builder must always commit before clear_to_base. (5) clear-to-base: send-keys timing flakiness (the uucompactclaude pattern needs the sleep to outlast the operation) could fire the menu selection before the menu renders.
**Signals to watch:** constraint_normalizer ingest count unchanged after migration; first-run debris-flag volume (expect high, should be batchable/suppressible); clear_to_base lands on the correct base entry across N consecutive tickets; `git log` + working files intact after every rewind; no half-rewound sessions.
**Gate condition:** Check by 2026-06-30 or when both T-why-sorter and the clear-to-base ticket (T-per-ticket-checkpoint) have shipped and run through at least one real builder cycle.

**Affected files:** None -- observation and verification only
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Observe predicted effects; annotate outcome as occurred / clear / partial and close
**Test plan:** no tests -- this is an observation ticket

**Completion criteria:**
- Each predicted effect annotated as occurred / clear / partial by the gate date (2026-06-30) or after one real builder cycle post-ship.
- Ticket closed with the outcome recorded.
body.intention: I intend that the predicted side-effects of the why-sorter and per-ticket-checkpoint changes are observed and annotated before this decision is considered closed.
